message:
test(unit): expand inline tests for bayesian_ledger, user_preferences (+51) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

bayesian_ledger: +24 tests — LedgerConfig, PaneState (Display, Hash, serde
  all 7 variants), Evidence serde variants, LedgerEntry, EvidenceStrength,
  ClassificationResult, ClassifierSnapshot, PaneClassificationSummary,
  BayesianClassifier pane_count/log_prior/snapshot

user_preferences: +27 tests — PaneState Debug/Clone/serde roundtrip,
  UserAction Copy/Eq/Hash/serde all variants, Observation Debug/Clone/serde,
  IrlConfig default values/serde(default) partial fill, RewardFunction
  new/serde, MaxEntIrl observation_count/trajectory wrap/serde,
  BatchResult, NUM_FEATURES, dot/cosine_similarity/rank_correlation edges

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
